## Content Need

## Target Audience

<!-- Who is the intended audience for this content? -->

- [ ] Beginners (new to stream computing)
- [ ] Intermediate (some experience with stream processing)
- [ ] Advanced (experienced practitioners)
- [ ] Researchers (academic/theoretical focus)
- [ ] Architects (system design focus)

## Content Category

<!-- Which category does this request belong to? -->

- [ ] Struct/ — Theoretical analysis / formal proofs
- [ ] Knowledge/ — Design patterns / business patterns / best practices
- [ ] Flink/ — Flink-specific architecture / API / runtime
- [ ] en/ — English translation or original English content
- [ ] LEARNING-PATHS/ — Learning path or certification guide
- [ ] COMMUNITY/ — Community docs / case studies

<!-- Describe what topics should be covered -->

## Desired Format

<!-- What format would be most helpful? -->

- [ ] Six-section theoretical analysis (Definitions → Properties → Relations → Argumentation → Proof → Examples)
- [ ] Practical guide with code examples
- [ ] Flink-specific tutorial
- [ ] Case study
- [ ] Decision tree / flowchart
- [ ] Cheat sheet / quick reference
- [ ] Visual diagram / infographic
- [ ] Knowledge graph entity enhancement

## Priority

<!-- How important is this content? -->

- [ ] Critical (blocking understanding of key concepts)
- [ ] High (significantly improves usability)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)
